entity.summary: Community decentralized exchange and DeFi platform for Moonriver and CLV, providing token swaps alongside farming, staking, lending, governance, and bridge access.
entity.notes: Current first-party Huckleberry homepage identifies the service as a community DEX and lending platform on Moonriver and Clover/CLV and exposes Swap, Farm, Stake, Lend, Vote, Bridge, and application entry points. CoinGecko and DefiLlama candidate sources independently corroborate the exchange identity; confidence is medium because detailed current protocol documentation is limited in this review pass.

evidence.title: Huckleberry official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party homepage identifies Huckleberry as a community DEX and lending platform on Moonriver and Clover/CLV and exposes Swap, Farm, Stake, Lend, Vote, Bridge, and Launch App navigation.

evidence.title: Huckleberry exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus identifies Huckleberry under the huckleberry.finance domain, corroborating the current first-party DEX identity.

evidence.title: Huckleberry AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus identifies Huckleberry AMM across Moonriver and CLV; HEI consolidates the AMM source row under the Huckleberry entity.
